slos.name: availability
slos.description: Percentage of successful GraphQL operations (non-5xx errors)
slos.sli: sum(rate(http_requests_total{status!~'5..'}[5m])) by (tenant_id, region, tenant_mode) / sum(rate(http_requests_total[5m])) by (tenant_id, region, tenant_mode)

slos.name: latency_p95
slos.description: p95 latency for all GraphQL operations
